items.name: Overseer Crossbow
items.description: Click and hold to rapidly fire arrows at your foes. Hit the 'Q' key to activate the Overseer's Menacing Arrow. Once fired, a massively sized Overseer Eye will magically replace the arrow and explode into hundreds of tiny eyes, which will shoot in all directions!

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Hydrian Elixir
items.description: Over the centuries, many have wondered how the KoSS descend upon the realm in times of peril. Only but a few know, the true source of the KoSS' power. The Hydrian Elixir grants the KoSS the ability to grow wings and fly for a short period of time. Not only does the elixir give them the ability of flight, but also increases their strength twofold and the wings attack anyone that get near them!

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Sword and Shield
items.description: Second only to the infamous Redcliff Archers, the Redcliff Knights who wield the sword and shield, are fast and efficient.  They see their target, and they take him out in 5 swipes or less.

items.name: Faux Firebrand
items.description: The magical weapon of the Brothers Ignis, a 1000-strong force of battlehardened shocktroops.

items.name: Astral Dimension Wings
items.description:
Texture created by LapzNetG:
https://roblox.com/users/123244139

These celestial wings pair especially well with blue, teal, and green attire, making them the perfect addition to any galaxy or winter holiday outfit. Whether you're a fairy, butterfly, mermaid, or even just wearing your favorite look, the Astral Dimension Wings will add a dash of starlight to your ROBLOX avatar! 

These were made in collaboration with AlexAstral based on a pair of wings from his upcoming project Charmlands--a magic universe where fairies, mermaids, butterflies, angels, and many other magical beings exist in a rainbow of harmony.

You can learn more about it here:
https://roblox.com/users/3501880

items.name: Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum Spellbook
items.description: Use the spell contained in this book to help stabilize the warring clans of ROBLOX.  Click to summon a protective shield that you can then fire at enemies.

items.name: Dauntless Oni Mask of Noxious Origins
items.description: This magical oni mask, adorned with poisonous hues and intricate patterns, possesses an aura of mystique that both allures and repels those who behold its deadly beauty.

items.name: Knights of the Seventh Sanctum : Dual Duel Axes
items.description: You're dueling.  Your opponent has an axe... but you have two!  Wield the unholy relics of the Seventh Sanctum and no one else stands a chance... unless they have these axes too.  But how likely is that?
